name: Angel's Kiss
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the dark creme de cacao slowly into a pony or pousse-cafe glass.
2. Carefully pour the Creme Yvette over a teaspoon held bottom-side up in the glass, allowing it to settle.
3. Slowly add the brandy over the Creme Yvette.
4. Finally, gently pour the sweet cream on top of the mixture.
Recipe by: Joe Robertson
Preparation Time: 0:05
